import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const FEATURES = [ { icon: '🩺', title: 'AI Symptom Analysis', desc: 'Describe how you feel in plain language. Our AI identifies nutritional deficiencies common in Kenya.' }, { icon: '🥬', title: 'Kenyan Food Guidance', desc: 'Get recommendations for locally available, affordable foods — omena, sukuma wiki, ugali and more.' }, { icon: '🏥', title: 'Hospital Locator', desc: 'Find verified healthcare facilities near you using OpenStreetMap — no expensive APIs.' }, { icon: '📊', title: 'Health History', desc: 'Track your analyses over time and monitor your nutritional health journey.' }, ]; const STATS = [ { value: '35%', label: 'of Kenyan women have iron deficiency anaemia' }, { value: '1:5,000', label: 'doctor-to-patient ratio in Kenya (WHO 2023)' }, { value: '26%', label: 'of children under 5 are stunted due to poor nutrition' }, ]; const DEFICIENCIES = [ { icon: '🩸', name: 'Iron Anaemia', color: '#dc2626' }, { icon: '👁️', name: 'Vitamin A', color: '#d97706' }, { icon: '☀️', name: 'Vitamin D', color: '#f59e0b' }, { icon: '🧠', name: 'Vitamin B12', color: '#0891b2' }, { icon: '🍃', name: 'Folate', color: '#16a34a' }, { icon: '🦋', name: 'Iodine', color: '#7c3aed' }, { icon: '🛡️', name: 'Zinc', color: '#0f766e' }, { icon: '🦴', name: 'Calcium', color: '#64748b' }, { icon: '🍊', name: 'Vitamin C', color: '#ea580c' }, { icon: '💪', name: 'Protein', color: '#b45309' }, ]; export default function Home() { return (
